title: Code Container
text: Code Container A Code Container is a type of Property that holds code, such as ProcScript, JavaScript, or HTML. It can contain one or more code modules, such as triggers, operations, functions, or entries, or HTML for the layout. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: — Main Development Object? No Part of: Entity , Field , Component , Application Shell , and their specializations Contains: Trigger, Operation, Function, Entry, Layout Generalization: Property Specializations — Compilation Output — Specialization Code Container specializes Property in the following ways: It can only contain script of some kind It has a dedicated editor, which supports syntax highlighting Was this topic helpful?
